creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Created attachment 199147
Patch

New upstream release.  Patch attached for the basic version bump.  This is minimal, updating the version, dropping applied patches and updating the library soversion in the pkg-plist.

Note that this release includes support for the "zstd" and "webp" codecs.  The port could have options for enabling these codecs.

Also note that there is now also a cmake build as well as the autotools build; this could also be switched to.


Regards,
Roger
